findings.description: figure::p199::1 (original shallow entity with caption only and image_ref) is now redundant alongside the new figure::p199::2 (full 4-panel structured entity covering the same diagram). Both reference 'img-0.jpeg'. The redundancy causes no content error but may produce a duplicate figure in downstream rendering.

reviewer_notes: The new figure::p199::2 entity accurately represents the 4-panel diagram. All four panels are correctly captured: オンプレミス (自社の敷地, 自社サーバ), ハウジングサービス (他社の敷地, 自社サーバ), ホスティングサービス (他社の敷地, 他社サーバ, location明確), クラウドコンピューティング (他社の敷地不明確, 他社サーバ, server inside cloud). The term entity for クラウドコンピューティング matches the definition text on the page. The only finding is a low-severity duplicate figure entity inherited from the original release; content accuracy is high.
